blocker: 15-min compute cap: ran 2 of 5 models (Anthropic-direct=HTTP400/out-of-credits; gemini dropped for latency) x 2 of 5 incidents x 3 seeds; full-roster script runs unchanged with more wall budget
one_line: Added a runnable pass@k frontier sweep (pass@1/2/5 + Wilson CI + std, vs frontier.py's mean-reward-only headline); real subset run 558.7s/0 errors showed REx pass@1 lift +0.833 (deepseek-v4-pro) and +1.000 (gpt-5.5), surfacing that gpt-5.5 zero-shot never resolves first-try (pass@1=0.0) despite positive mean reward
